# Pull Request Template

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Contribution Type

- [ ] Project submission
- [ ] Article submission
- [ ] Talk submission
- [ ] Tutorial submission
- [ ] Event submission
- [ ] Member profile submission
- [ ] Documentation/process improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] I used the relevant template from templates/
- [ ] I placed files in the correct directory
- [ ] I followed naming conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I verified all links are valid
- [ ] I proofread content for clarity and accuracy
- [ ] I have read CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

## Related Links

Reference related issues, discussions, or resources.

## Additional Notes

Any extra context for reviewers.
